text:
dharamshalas: name: Kalaram Temple Dharmshala; cost: Free/Donation; capacity: 300; location: Panchavati, name: Juna Akhara Camp; cost: Free for pilgrims; note: Available during Kumbh period, name: Sikh Gurudwara Dharmshala; cost: Free; includes: Free langar meals, name: Marwari Dharamshala Nashik; cost: ₹100-200/night
budget_hotels: en: Budget hotels available in Panchavati and CBS Stand areas. Range: ₹500-1500/night. Book 3-4 months ahead for Kumbh period.; areas: Panchavati Road, CBS Stand, Sharanpur Road, College Road
kumbh_tent_city: en: During Kumbh Mela, official Tent City is set up by Maharashtra Tourism near Tapovan area. AC and non-AC tents available. Book via Maharashtra Tourism website.; cost: ₹2000-8000 per night depending on category
AC and non-AC tents available. Book via Maharashtra Tourism website.; cost: ₹2000-8000 per night depending on category
Book via Maharashtra Tourism website.; cost: ₹2000-8000 per night depending on category
